91:

93: 		try {
94: 			stringEncrypter = new StandardPBEStringEncryptor();
95: 			stringEncrypter.setPasswordCharArray(chars);
96: 
97: 			if (getProviderName() != null && !getProviderName().isEmpty()) {
98: 				stringEncrypter.setProviderName(getProviderName());
99: 			}
100: 			stringEncrypter.setAlgorithm(getAlgorithm());
101: 
102: 			PBEPasswordEncoder encoder = new PBEPasswordEncoder();
103: 			encoder.setPbeStringEncryptor(stringEncrypter);

105: 			return encoder;

108: 			scramble(chars);
109: 		}
